This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Goliath's Base DMG +[Arg3]%, and {Blade's Dominion} temporarily increases Goliath's Final DMG by [Arg4]%.
When there are 1/2/3 other {Lemurian} Awakeners in the team, all Awakeners' {STR} Generation +6%/15%/30%.
